tasks.title: Centralize External Secrets Management
tasks.description: Install pass, generate GPG key, migrate all secrets from ~/.openclaw/.env, credentials/, n8n-stack/.env into encrypted store.

tasks.title: ClawVault: task + backlog management
tasks.description: Use clawvault task instead of ad-hoc tracking. Triage auto-captured backlog items regularly.

tasks.title: ClawVault: register active projects
tasks.description: Register Dominica proposal, SXM cams, n8n workflows etc. so context pulls are project-aware.

tasks.title: ClawVault: custom observation routes
tasks.description: Configure routing rules so topic patterns get categorized correctly (topic 197→dominica, 99→coastguard, etc.)

tasks.title: ClawVault: commitment tracking discipline
tasks.description: Create commitments when agreeing to tasks (observe already started extracting some). Build the habit.

tasks.title: ClawVault: preferences + patterns recording
tasks.description: Record working preferences as they come up (not just USER.md). Log recurring behavioral patterns for self-improvement.

tasks.title: ClawVault: session recaps for long sessions
tasks.description: Generate recaps for long sessions before they expire. Preserve context across session resets.
